faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CertFast.

items.question: How long does SOC 2 really take?
items.answer: With CertFast, most startups achieve SOC 2 Type II in 90 days on average. Without automation, the process typically takes 12+ months due to manual evidence collection and consultant back-and-forth.

items.question: Do I still need an auditor?
items.answer: Yes, you'll still need a third-party auditor to issue your SOC 2 report. However, CertFast prepares all the evidence, documentation, and processes needed for the audit, significantly reducing the time and cost of the audit itself.

items.question: What if I'm not technical?
items.answer: CertFast is designed for teams of all technical levels. Our guided roadmap breaks down each task into simple, actionable steps. Plus, our support team is always available to help if you get stuck.

items.question: Can I switch from Vanta?
items.answer: Absolutely! We can import your existing compliance data, evidence, and progress from Vanta or other platforms. Most customers switch within a day and save 80% on their compliance costs.

items.question: What frameworks do you support?
items.answer: We currently support SOC 2 Type I & II, ISO 27001, and GDPR compliance. HIPAA and PCI DSS are coming soon. You can track multiple frameworks simultaneously with our Pro and Enterprise plans.

seo.title: About Us | CertFast
seo.description: Meet the team behind CertFast. Founded in Caen, France, we're building the compliance platform we wish we had.

about.heroSubtitle: We started CertFast because we lived the compliance nightmare ourselves.

story.title: The Problem
story.text: In 2024, our team lost 6 months and €80K on SOC 2. Manual processes, expensive consultants, and endless frustration.

story.title: The Solution
story.text: We decided to build the platform we wish we had: automation for repetitive tasks and a clear roadmap for teams.

story.title: Our Mission
story.text: Make compliance accessible for every startup. Great products should not be blocked by administrative overhead.

about.quote: We built CertFast for the 3 AM panic attacks before audit day. Nobody should have to go through that.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | CertFast
seo.description: CertFast Privacy Policy - Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in compliance with GDPR.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: CertFast is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our service.

sections.title: Data We Collect
sections.content: We collect account data, compliance documents, usage logs, and billing information needed to operate the platform.

sections.title: How We Use Data
sections.content: We use data to provide the service, secure accounts, improve product quality, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: Legal Basis
sections.content: We process data based on contractual necessity, legitimate interests, consent, and legal obligations under GDPR.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary for contractual, legal, and security purposes.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You may request access, correction, deletion, portability, and restriction. Contact data@certfast.io to exercise your rights.

sections.title: International Transfers
sections.content: Data is primarily processed in the EU. When transfers are required, we use appropriate contractual safeguards.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For privacy questions, contact data@certfast.io or your local data protection authority (CNIL in France).

seo.title: Terms of Service | CertFast
seo.description: CertFast Terms of Service - Read the terms and conditions governing your use of our compliance automation platform.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
sections.content: By using CertFast, you agree to these terms and our privacy policy. If you use CertFast for an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind it.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
sections.content: CertFast provides compliance automation tools for frameworks including SOC 2, ISO 27001, and GDPR.

sections.title: 3. Accounts and Security
sections.content: You are responsible for your account credentials and must notify us of unauthorized access.

sections.title: 4. Billing
sections.content: Paid plans are billed monthly or annually. Fees are non-refundable unless required by law.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable Use
sections.content: You must not misuse the service, attempt unauthorized access, or upload harmful code.

sections.title: 6. Intellectual Property
sections.content: CertFast owns the platform and brand. You retain ownership of your own uploaded content.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the extent permitted by law, CertFast is not liable for indirect or consequential damages.

sections.title: 8. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by French law, with jurisdiction in Paris courts.

sections.title: 9. Contact
sections.content: For legal questions, contact legal@certfast.io.

seo.title: Cookie Policy | CertFast
seo.description: Learn how CertFast uses cookies and similar technologies.

sections.title: What are cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to remember settings and improve your experience.

sections.title: How we use cookies
sections.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and security, plus optional analytics cookies to improve the product.

sections.title: Managing cookies
sections.content: You can control cookies from your browser settings and delete existing cookies at any time.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For cookie-related questions, contact data@certfast.io.
